artifact.description: Replace the TEST Glue ETL script with the real Spark ETL script after Terraform provisioning.

notes: CI/CD agent should upload the real Spark ETL script to the same S3 key used by the Glue job (jobs/etl_job_test.py) or update the Glue job script_location accordingly. The Glue job already has IAM permissions to read the script from the scripts bucket and write to the output bucket.
